message.content:
Read and analyze the database migration file for code review. Read the file at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server/src/main/resources/db/changelog/008_announcement_upgrade.xml and also read D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server/src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml to see how it's included.

Then check the git diff for this file: run `cd D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server && git diff master...HEAD -- src/main/resources/db/changelog/008_announcement_upgrade.xml src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml`

Analyze for:
1. Are new columns nullable? Do they have defaults?
2. Index considerations for new columns
3. Data migration safety (large table concerns)
4. Any issues with the changeset structure

Return a detailed analysis.
